block_01: Self-control is extremely important in any task, but when it comes to money, it is absolutely crucial. If you find that you are unable to reach the efficiency you strive for in trading, try working on improving your discipline.
block_02: How to go about it? Step #1: study your weaknesses. Are you vulnerable to emotions in trading? Is it hard for you to concentrate or plan a trading strategy? Finding out what is holding you back is the first place to start.
block_03: Check out the full article to learn how to quickly improve your trading discipline.
